task.role: You are a Senior Mobile Engineer with expertise in React Native and cross-platform development. Implement Task 29 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Create Expo React Native app with push notification support and basic screens
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 16, 22 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Initialize Expo SDK 50+ project
2. Set up navigation with bottom tabs
3. Implement push notification registration
4. Create basic screens for notifications, settings
5. Add authentication flow with biometric support

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-29): Mobile App Foundation (Tap - Expo)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
App builds and runs on simulator, push notifications register successfully, navigation works, authentication functional

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
